utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 7 items in the required format: destination, travel_dates, transportation (flight details with costs), accommodation (hotel selection with costs), activities (selected activities with costs), additional_services (any extra services with costs), total_budget (complete cost breakdown). All 7 appear in the final package. Now check full specification: 1) destination: provided (Prague, Czech Republic) — fully specified. 2) travel_dates: provided specific dates — fully specified. 3) transportation: flight details with costs — has type, route (CDG↔PRG), class, cost 460; airline is only 'Budget Airline' but still flight details with cost are present — acceptable. 4) accommodation: hotel selection with costs — type, name “Historic Lodge,” duration, cost 420 — fully specified. 5) activities: selected activities with costs — two activities each with name and cost — fully specified. 6) additional_services: extra services with costs — restaurant recommendations with details and cost 0 — fully specified. 7) total_budget: complete cost breakdown — includes total_confirmed_cost, initial_budget, remaining_for_expenses — fully specified. Therefore, 7/7 items are successfully included and fully specified.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: We match each element in the finalized package to the exact item names present in the ground-truth ratings and extract their ratings. The destination 'Prague, Czech Republic' maps directly to the destinations list. Transportation specifies 'Budget Airline, Economy Class,' which maps to transportation.budget_airlines.Economy Class. Accommodation hotel name 'Historic Lodge' exists under accommodation. Activities include 'Guided tour of the Prague Castle complex' and 'Vltava River cruise'—these exact activities are not listed in the ground-truth activities set, so no direct rating mapping is available for them. Therefore, only map the items that have exact matches in the ground-truth ratings.
